case_number: criminal case in respect of FIR No. 41/2016

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1789 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. Fro katcha peshi. 21.11.2016. Mr.Aijaz Ali Bhutto, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w ASI Piral Dahri o/b of SHO P.S Pubjo and SSP Shaheed Benazirabad. = Today, the official respondents have filed their parawise comments and while refuting the allegations of causing harassment to the petitioner they have stated that a criminal case in respect of FIR No. 41/2016 is sub judice before the concerned Court. However, petitioner’s Counsel submits that there is inordinate delay in lodging of FIR, which shows the malafide on the part of the complainant. Be that as it may, the petitioner may seek his remedy before the concerned Court. However, the present petition is disposed of with the directions that no harassment should be caused to the petitioner by the respondents. JUDGE Shahid
